reference_contexts: ['To achieve this, the content encoder uses a shared-weight Siamese network, referred to as the maintain resolution backbone (MRB)']
reference: MRB指的是保持分辨率主干(maintain resolution backbone)，它是一个共享权重的孪生网络，用于提取多尺度内容信息。

reference_contexts: ['As shown in Fig. 4, we partition the bitemporal images into three distinct regions: changed regions, unchanged regions, and regions of no interest.']

user_input: 相比于ViT，ConvNeXt在森林变化检测任务中具有哪些优势？
reference_contexts: ['Despite ViT advantage in receptive field, the computational complexity of the self-attention mechanism is high... Another CNN, ConvNeXt... achieves performance comparable to the current ViT architecture, while possessing higher computational efficiency. It is easy to be trained and deployed...']
reference: 相比于ViT，ConvNeXt具有更高的计算效率，易于训练和部署，具有高稳定性和对超参数的低敏感性，且能在数据量不足的情况下表现更好。

user_input: CAFENet是如何同时解决双时相图像风格差异和上采样细节丢失问题的？
reference_contexts: ['A Fourier feature exchange module (FFEM) is designed to reduce brightness, color, and style discrepancies between bitemporal images... We propose DCAU to address the loss of high-frequency details, such as edge blurring and texture distortion, in traditional upsampling methods.']
reference: CAFENet通过傅里叶特征交换模块(FFEM)减少双时相图像的亮度、颜色和风格差异来解决风格差异问题；通过动态内容感知上采样模块(DCAU)自适应生成偏移量来恢复空间分辨率，解决上采样中的细节丢失问题。
